List of all possible adaptability values for Protomon. Can have values from D to SSS. Values within the same list are '''NOT''' mutually exclusive. [[Typhon]] has both Oxygen + and Oxygen.

=== Biomes ===
<ul>
	<li>Forest</li>
	<li>Frost</li>
	<li>Desert</li>
	<li>Swamp</li>
	<li>Prairie</li>
</ul>

=== Weather Conditions ===
<ul>
	<li>Rainy</li>
	<li>Foggy</li>
	<li>Sunny</li>
	<li>Snowy</li>
	<li>Thunder</li>
</ul>

=== Air Quality ===
<ul>
	<li>Smoggy</li>
	<li>Wind</li>
</ul>

=== Temperature ===
<ul>
	<li>Scorching</li>
	<li>Hot</li>
	<li>Warm</li>
	<li>Cool</li>
	<li>Cold</li>
	<li>Chilly</li>
</ul>

=== Visibility ===
<ul>
	<li>High Visibility</li>
	<li>Low Visibility</li>
</ul>

=== Humidity ===
<ul>
	<li>Humid</li>
	<li>Moist</li>
	<li>Dry</li>
</ul>

=== Oxygen Levels ===
<ul>
	<li>Oxygen +</li>
	<li>Oxygen</li>
	<li>Oxygen -</li>
</ul>

=== Radiation Levels ===
<ul>
	<li>Radiation + +</li>
	<li>Radiation +</li>
	<li>No Radiation</li>
</ul>

=== Cosmic Rays ===
<ul>
	<li>Cosmic Rays + +</li>
	<li>Cosmic Rays +</li>
	<li>No Cosmic Rays</li>
</ul>

=== Time Storms ===
<ul>
	<li>Time Storm + +</li>
	<li>Time Storm +</li>
	<li>No Time Storm</li>
</ul>

=== Electromagnetic Interference ===
<ul>
	<li>Electromagnetic Interference + +</li>
	<li>Electromagnetic Interference +</li>
	<li>No Electromagnetic Interference</li>
</ul>
